programme.title: Always Funny Top 25
programme.desc: Get ready for the funniest Top 25 clumsy people, pranks, extreme disasters, fails on fails, and much more!

programme.title: Marc Yaffee
programme.desc: Adopted at birth and confused ever since, Marc takes his audiences on a comedy joyride as he explores his multi-ethnic roots and the culture clashes that fill his world. Marc's smart but relatable comedy demonstrates a universal appeal that has landed him appearances on PBS, Comics Unleashed, The Latino Laugh Festival and the Showtime special, Goin' Native. Funny not filthy, Marc serves audiences his original comedy recipe, specially prepared for non- stop laughs. Tasty topics, spicy premises and savory punchlines, are all dished out with a dash of sarcasm and a grain of salt. A regular in Las Vegas, Marc has performed six times overseas for Armed Forces Entertainment and he's a past winner of Ventura Comedy Festival's Funniest Person Contest.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.sub-title: My Life As I Know It Now
programme.desc: With an act that crosses all boundaries, B.T. will surely have you rolling with laughter. His physical performance style and charm landed him two performances on NBC's Friday Night Videos and a performance at the prestigious HBO U.S. Comedy Arts Festival. B.T. has also appeared on BET's Comic View, MTV's The Jenny McCarthy Show, and FOX's The Keenan Ivory Wayans Show.

programme.title: Don Barnhart
programme.desc: Don's ability to keep audiences of all ages howling with laughter and coming back for more is what separates him from the average joke teller.

programme.title: David Dyer
programme.desc: David Dyer has been performing at stand-up at comedy clubs and corporate events for over twenty years. He's worked with some of the best comics in the industry including Mike Birbiglia, Jim Breuer, and Lewis Black. He's been a contributing writer to NBC's Late Night with Jimmy Fallon and ABC's Politically Incorrect. He's a regular on the nationally syndicated Bob and Tom Show and often appears on the roster for their “Friends of The Bob and Tom Show” comedy tour. He's the host of a new web series called Sidecar Sessions where he interviews guests who are sitting in the sidecar of his motorcycle as David pilots the bike around town. David also created and stars in another web series called Pillars with co-star, Kevin Yon. David became an on-call firefighter with Grand Rapids Township in Michigan….his wife is nervous.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Greg Warren is a nationally touring headliner and has been featured on Late Night with Seth Meyers, Last Comic Standing, Comedy Central Presents, The Late Late Show with Craig Ferguson, BET and CMT. Greg is a fan favorite on the nationally syndicated Bob and Tom Radio Show and can be heard daily on Sirius/XM.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Fueling his comedy with stories from his suburban life, Jim Colliton jokes about shredding children's art work, cats with depression, and wanting to fly separate from his wife.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: John Branyan's comedy is smart and sarcastic in perfect proportions. This special features his perspective on why God made everyone stupid and his unparalleled Shakespearean take on The Three Little Pigs.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Corey is a highly sought after national touring college, club and corporate and cruise ship performer. He was the winner of The Catch a New Rising Star, The Funniest Comic in New England and the 2017 Big Sky Comedy Festivals. Rodrigues has been featured on the hilarious Gotham Live, Laughs on Fox and True Tv's Laff Mobbs Laff Tracks television shows and currently can be heard on Sirius XM. He combines comedy from his own life and the lives of those around him. Mix that with a hilarious point of view and he's able to talk about just about anything.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Dave is the winner of the prestigious 43rd annual San Francisco Comedy Competition, and runner up in the Moth's largest US Grandslam storytelling competition.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Glen Tickle apologizes for his last name, explains the things only professional comedians have time for, and tells all the stories hes only allowed to tell on stage.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: For 20 years Costaki has been living his dream as a full-time stand up comic. He has written jokes for Bette Midler, Jay Leno, MTV, and BET. You may have seen him on Showtime or heard him on Sirius, but you probably know him best from his regular appearances on the nationally syndicated Bob & Tom Radio Show.

programme.title: Jeff Dunham: Unhinged In Hollywood
programme.desc: Jeff Dunham stars in this special from the world famous Dolby Theatre in Hollywood.

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: RiffTrax, the guys who make movies funny, bring their comedic riffing treatment to this cheesy 50's sci-fi classic! It's a tale of a man who transforms into a violent lizard creature whenever he is in the sun too long! Join Mike, Kevin and Bill for The Hideous Sun Demon!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: The stars of Mystery Science Theater 3000 bring their comedic riffing treatment to this short about a boy who has to take his goat to the market. Join Mike, Kevin, and Bill for Zlateh the Goat!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: This movie has it all and then some: romance, political intrigue, studying, rich uncles, big bands, familial strife, journalism, jazz, soda fountains, swing dance, real estate, and a prom! This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by Bridget and Mary Jo from RiffTrax (formerly of Mystery Science Theater 3000).

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: A more accurate title would have been I Occasionally Chop Off Heads With a Machete Because I'm The Voodoo Kind Of Zombie, Not The BRAAAAINS Kind. This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from RiffTrax (formerly of MST3K).

programme.title: RiffTrax

programme.desc: The stars of Mystery Science Theater 3000 bring their comedic riffing treatment to this educational child development film. Join Mike, Kevin, and Bill for Frustrating Fours and Fascinating Fives!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: RiffTrax, the guys who make movies funny, bring their comedic riffing treatment to this "so bad it's still bad" movie where Estonian cyborgs shoot lasers out of their eyes! Join Mike, Kevin, and Bill for Firehead!

programme.title: Gladiator
programme.desc: A man robbed of his name and his dignity strives to win them back, and gain the freedom of his people, in this epic historical drama from director Ridley Scott.

programme.title: Ninja: Shadow of a Tear
programme.desc: Ninjutsu master Casey is back and out for revenge when his pregnant wife is murdered.

programme.title: Jade Warrior
programme.desc: Thousands of years ago in ancient China, a love struck sword hero fights against his destiny. He wants another chance to be reunited with his loved one and he gets that chance, in a far away place and a far away time, in the cold north, in modern Finland.

programme.title: Solomon Kane
programme.desc: Captain Solomon Kane (James Purefoy) is a brutally efficient 16th Century killing machine. Armed with his signature pistols, cutlass and rapier, he and his men unleash their bloodlust as they fight for England in war after war on all continents. As the story opens, Kane and his band of pillagers are carving a bloody path through hordes of defenders in an exotic city in northern Africa. But, when Kane decides to attack a mysterious nearby castle to plunder its rumored riches, his mission takes a fateful turn. One by one, Kane's men are picked off by demonic creatures until he alone is left to face the Devil's own Reaper -- dispatched from the depths of Hell to lay claim to his hopelessly corrupt soul. Though Kane at last manages to escape, he knows that he now must redeem himself by renouncing violence and devoting himself wholly to a life of peace and purity.

programme.title: The Spy Who Dumped Me
programme.desc: Audrey and her friend Morgan are going about their humdrum lives when AudreyÕs unassuming ex-boyfriend Drew shows up at their apartment with a team of deadly assassins on his trail. Surprising even themselves, the two friends jump into action when two men are shot dead on their floor, grabbing a top-secret thumb drive and taking off on an undercover mission to save the world.

programme.title: Chaos
programme.desc: After a deadly bank heist, Detectives Quentin Conners (Jason Statham) and Shane Dekker (Ryan Phillippe) are drawn into a mysterious case where nothing is what it seems. Pulling the strings is a criminal mastermind (Wesley Snipes) who seems to kill without warning or reason. Abound with random acts of violence and deception - the only hope for survival is finding an order to the chaos.

programme.title: Mechanic Resurrection
programme.desc: Arthur Bishop [Jason Statham] returns as the Mechanic in the sequel to the 2011 action-thiller. When the deceitful actions of a cunning but beautiful woman [Jessica Alba] force him to return to the life he left behind, Bishop's life is once again in danger as he has to complete an impossible list of assassinations of the most dangerous men in the world.

programme.title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day

programme.title: Transformers: Dark of the Moon
programme.desc: A mysterious event from Earth's past threatens to ignite a war so big that the Transformers alone will not be able to save the planet. Sam Witwicky and the Autobots must fight against the darkness to defend our world from the Decepticons.

programme.title: Eagle Eye
programme.desc: Shia LaBeouf and Michelle Monaghan star as two strangers trying to escape danger when they are ripped from their ordinary lives and 'activated' as part of a hightech assassination plot.

programme.desc: An American WWI vet undertakes a spiritual quest that takes him from the Himalayas and back to his hometown.

programme.title: Sahara

programme.title: Ike: Countdown To D-Day

programme.title: The Goddess
programme.desc: A struggling actress's unhappy childhood plagues her quest for fame and fortune in Hollywood.

programme.title: Ship of Fools
programme.desc: Passengers on a ship traveling from Mexico to Europe in the 1930s represent society at large in that era.

programme.title: The Silencers
programme.desc: The first of the series of Secret Agent Matt Helm films, the big cheese of Big O, an organization that wants to sabatoge the American atomic missile system.

programme.title: King Creole
programme.desc: Elvis Presley gives Bourbon Street a new beat in King Creole. He plays a troubled youth whose singing sets the French Quarter rockin'.

programme.title: Roustabout
programme.desc: Elvis is a karate-chopping biker who's hired as a carnival Roustabout. At first, he just provides muscle and a diversion for the beautiful carny girls. Then he picks up a guitar and gets the midway rockin'.

programme.title: The Fighting Seabees
programme.desc: The construction foreman of a fighting work battalion to be stationed near Japanese lines in the Pacific and a naval commander colleague compete in Washington for a journalist, while preparing to engage the enemy in a massive assault.

programme.title: Fun in Acapulco
programme.desc: Elvis heads south of the border, where he's fired as a boat hand, hired as a lifeguard and singer, admired by local beauties and inspired to jump off a 136-foot cliff. Put another way: he overcomes a fear of heights in spectacular fashion.

channel.display-name: Movies on the Rotten Tomatoes Channel

programme.title: The Ipcress File
programme.desc: Crook-turned-secret-agent Harry Palmer tries to find a missing scientist.

programme.title: Loving
programme.desc: An interracial couple fights the law that they cannot be recognized as married in the state of Virginia.

programme.title: The Paleface
programme.desc: A dentist is duped into marrying sharpshooter Calamity Jane.

programme.title: Senior Love Triangle
programme.desc: An 84-year old charming but delusional WWII veteran forms relationships with two elderly women and goes on a crusade to save them from the isolation of their retirement homes in east Hollywood. Starring Travis Van Winkle and Tom Bower

programme.title: Still Today
programme.desc: After being left at the altar, Pete's groomsman give him a wedding gift he'll never forget. An escort. Maybe it's the Lunar eclipse, maybe it's fate, but after a magical night in the city maybe this girl is what Pete needed all along.

programme.title: 10e
programme.desc: After a 17-year old girl's reputation takes a hit at school before the prom, her single father tries to rebuild their relationship by acting as more of a friend, when what she really needs is a father.

programme.title: Vanilla
programme.desc: A freewheeling comedienne determined to save her family business persuades an uptight app developer to go on a long first date - a road trip to New Orleans to sell a van with a complicated history.

programme.title: FBI: Negotiator
programme.desc: An FBI agent must negotiate with a woman holding a hospital hostage in order to get her hands on an experimental drug.

programme.title: Love on the Reef
programme.desc: A marine biologist and a laissez-faire dive instructor must team up to save their beloved reef.

programme.title: A Royal Makeover
programme.desc: When Ramone discovers he is about to be King, he takes lessons from royal expert Angelica.

programme.title: Food for the Heart
programme.desc: After taking on too much with her meal delivery service, Lia accepts her neighbor Eli's help.

programme.title: The Wedding Rule
programme.desc: Gemma and Max, former childhood friends are bequeathed a restaurant but must pretend to be married.

programme.title: The Mayflower Madam
programme.desc: Inspired by the life of Sydney Biddle Barrows, this film depicts Miss Barrows who, for four years, led a double life.

programme.title: The Wild Girl
programme.desc: Chicago photojournalist Ned Giles heads out west to join the 1932 Great Apache Expedition-an arduous trek into the Sierra Madre Mountains to rescue a seven-year-old boy kidnapped by the Apache Indians.

programme.title: China Rose
programme.desc: A man arrives in China to search for his son, whom he hasn't seen in many years. A female American Embassy employee, who knows the country and speaks the language, is assigned to assist him, but soon they run into more trouble than they expected.

programme.title: Search and Rescue
programme.desc: An extraordinary search and rescue team soars to new heights in the Sierra Mountains. Pressed into action, this crew is anything but ordinary.

programme.title: Mission Possible
programme.desc: To a private investigator Woo Su-han, who will take on any job if it pays the bill, a secret agent Yoo Da-hee comes along with $10,000 in cash. She proposes a joint operation to investigate an arms trafficking case. They attract more attention when they're together and as the scope of this case increases by the minute, they leave behind evidence that put them on police's target list...

programme.title: Welcome to Dongmakgol
programme.desc: During the Korean War, North and South Korean soldiers confront at a fairy tale-like village Dongmakgol.

programme.title: Familyhood
programme.desc: A self-centered diva Ju-yeon always gets what she wants. One day she realizes that she needs her own baby.

programme.title: Detective K: Secret of Virtuous Widow
programme.desc: A series of murders break out in Joseon. King Jeong-jo commissions a famous detective K to solve the case.

programme.title: Married Men and Single Women
programme.desc: When three married men decide to step out on their marriages they get more than they bargained for. As each settle into lustful and emotional affairs with their mistresses, they soon find that infidelity has unpredictable and devastating consequences. Betrayal, hypocrisy, racism and several other matters surface as MARRIED MEN AND SINGLE WOMEN come together.

programme.title: More Than Friends
programme.desc: When Angela, a heterosexual, learns her friend, Tennille, loves her, she is surprised to find that she may feel the same.

programme.title: One More Day
programme.desc: "Raquel Ferguson, is an up and coming photographer and single mother to a 15 year old daughter. As her business grows, it causes more strain on the relationship between them. Raquel is driven by the need to be better than her mother, who she has never forgiven for things in the past. Raquel is unable to see the hypocrisy in her own life, as her relationship with her daughter deteriorates right under her nose. When a terrible tragedy occurs, Raquel begs God for a miracle. "

programme.title: Concrete Canyons
programme.desc: In this thrilling crime drama, a sheriff searches for his son who is accused of murder and on the run from the law.

programme.title: The Matthew Shepard Story
programme.desc: In this dramatization of an actual event, young Matthew Shepard (Shane Meier) is mercilessly slain by a pair of men who targeted their victim because of his homosexuality. Capital punishment looming, the killers' fate lies in the hands of Matthew's parents, Judy (Stockard Channing) and Dennis (Sam Waterston). As the grieving couple attempts to make the choice that will best serve Matthew's memory, they recount his rocky adolescence, lifelong struggle for acceptance and personal views on life.

programme.title: Find Me Guilty
programme.desc: Imprisoned on a drug charge, mobster Jack DiNorscio (Vin Diesel) refuses to testify against his former associates in the Lucchesi crime family. When an ambitious prosecutor brings him back to court, he decides to defend himself. Initially regarded with disbelief, his forceful presence and knowledge of the law turn the tide of the trial.

programme.title: The Long Walk Home
programme.desc: Odessa Carter (Whoopi Goldberg) needs to get to work as a nanny in the home of the affluent Miriam Thompson (Sissy Spacek), but she refuses to take the bus. Odessa is participating in the Montgomery bus boycott, protesting against the inequality between blacks and whites, so Miriam decides to offer Odessa a ride to work every day. Though the community and Miriam's husband (Dwight Schultz) insist she not get involved, the relationship between Miriam and Odessa has already changed for the better.

programme.title: Taking Earth
programme.desc: The human race is thrown into chaos as an alien invasion takes control of the planet in an effort to find one boy out of seven billion people who holds the power to destroy them.

programme.title: Control
programme.desc: A sociopath on death row (Ray Liotta, "Goodfellas") is given a chance to live if he agrees to take part in a chemical behavior modification program. Also starring Willem Dafoe, Michelle Rodriguez ("Lost") and Stephen Rea ("The Crying Game").

programme.title: Double Identity

programme.title: Britney Spears
programme.desc: Filmed at Roundhouse, London, this concert film will give all fans a spectacular Live experience from start to finish. Britney Spears performs her hits including "Baby One More Time", "Oops! I Did It Again", "Toxic" and many more.

programme.title: Katy Perry
programme.desc: The Prismatic World Tour is a sensory explosion of eye-popping theatrics, daring acrobatics and of course, all the hits. This concert film is a visually stunning production that captures Katy's fun-loving personality and artistic vision. Spanning the entire length of the arena floor, the innovative Prismatic tour stage allows Katy to share intimate moments with her fans in a unique shared connection with the music. Directed for the stage in seven thematic acts, this unmissable spectacle features hit after hit after hit. The World Tour captures the excitement, color and energy of the live Katy Perry extravaganza.

programme.title: Aerosmith
programme.desc: In a career of four turbulent decades of excesses and highs, Aerosmith became the biggest selling American rock band of all time. The ‘Bad Boys' came together in 1970 in Boston, Massachusetts. Aerosmith's third release, ‘Toys in the Attic' made them international stars. Lead single,'Sweet Emotion' became their first top 40 hit. In 1987 Aerosmith released their biggest selling album in over a decade, ‘Permanent Vacation'. The ‘Nine Lives' tour was troubled, but in 1998 Aerosmith's fortunes would change once again. Released as part of the soundtrack to the film, ‘Armageddon', ‘I Don't Want to Miss a Thing' would become the biggest single of their career. In 2012 Aerosmith released the single, ‘Legendary Child'. It had been eight years since they had produced new material but along with the track came the album, ‘Music from another Dimension'. Featuring archive material, music videos – “I DON'T WANNA MISS A THING” “JANIES GOT A GUN” and, exclusive insights from music critics and journalists JOHN AIZLEWOOD (Evening Standard), DANIELLE PERRY (XFM), WILL HODGKINSON (The Times) & CAMILLA PIA (BBC Radio 6).

programme.title: Foo Fighters
programme.desc: With a career of over two decades and album sales over 11 million, Foo Fighters are giants in the world of contemporary rock. The roots of the band were of a much smaller scale, though, with the early musical projects of a teenage Dave Grohl. Nirvana came to a tragic end with the death of front man, Kurt Cobain. Grohl began working with the songs he had written on tour, to produce the first Foo Fighters album. With 2 Grammys, multiple albums including a best of and a new album release in 2014 there is no stopping them. Featuring archive material, music videos – “BEST OF YOU” “MONKEY WRENCH” and, exclusive insights from music critics and journalists JOHN AIZLEWOOD (Evening Standard), DANIELLE PERRY (XFM), WILL HODGKINSON (The Times) & CAMILLA PIA (BBC Radio 6)

programme.title: Serpiente
programme.desc: Un profesor de biología que intenta salvar a su hija enferma con una cura natural, se adentra en la jungla y encuentra un horror que es más grande que la vida.

programme.title: Titanic 2
programme.desc: Un moderno transatlántico bautizado "Titanic 2" sigue el camino del primero. Pero un tsunami arroja un iceberg en el camino y deben luchar para evitar un destino similar.

programme.title: Los Tentáculos de las Bermudas
programme.desc: Un avión se estrella sobre el Triángulo de las Bermudas y la Marina envía al mejor equipo de rescate. Pero al salvar al presidente, despiertan a una criatura amenazante.

programme.title: Pánico En Altamar
programme.desc: Un grupo de viejos amigos de la escuela secundaria se olvidan de bajar la escalera antes de saltar al océano para nadar.

programme.title: Mar Abierto
programme.desc: Una pareja disfruta sus tan esperadas vacaciones tropicales en el Caribe. Sin embargo se quedan varados en aguas infestadas de tiburones.

programme.title: Destilando amor: Chantaje
programme.desc: Rodrigo lleva a Clarita al pueblo para sorprender a Gaviota en su cumpleaños. Minerva comienza a sospechar que Aarón la engaña de nuevo y le exige volver a su casa o confesará todo lo que sabe sobre él.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre
programme.desc: Juan regresa con sus hermanos, pero sigue sin recordarlos. Sofía le pide al comisario que detenga a Juan.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre
programme.desc: Juan organiza una búsqueda por todo el pueblo para encontrar a su hija, pero la policía llega para detenerlo. Sofía sufre al no tener noticia del paradero de su hija. Rosario escucha a Fernando hablar sobre lo que le hizo a Juan.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre
programme.desc: Leonora visita a Sofía para confirmarle que Juan llegó solo y sin memoria al monte. Juan está a punto de ser trasladado a la prisión de Puebla, pero Sofía retira los cargos en su contra.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre
programme.desc: Juan le confiesa a Sofía que nunca ha dejado de amarla, pero ella ya no puede creer en él. Óscar le cuenta a Jimena todo lo relacionado con su divorcio. Fernando decide llevarse lejos a Gabriela para que sus nervios no los delaten.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre
programme.desc: Sofía le dice a Demián que no puede corresponder su amor, pero él está dispuesto a pelear por ella. Antes de irse del pueblo, Rosario decide acompañar a Armando para abrir la caja fuerte de Fernando. Juan busca a Sofía, pero ella lo rechaza.

programme.title: Rubí
programme.desc: Rubí empieza a coquetearle a Héctor y consigue trabajar con él en el despacho de su padrino, pero él se siente preocupado, porque Rubí es compañera de Luis, un hijo que tiene con otra persona.

programme.title: Rubí
programme.desc: Una vez en la oficina, Rubí no pierde momento para coquetearle a Héctor. Alejandro sospecha que Rubí se trae algo entre manos. Héctor empieza a caer en los juegos de seducción de Rubí y descuida ciertas atenciones con Maribel.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: Meche invita a Jorge Luis a la fiesta de 15 años de Rosario. Santiago comienza a preparar la boda y el testamento para María Mercedes.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: Meche se pone triste al saber que Jorge Luis no asistirá a la fiesta de Rosario. La gente de la vecindad se prepara para la fiesta de Rosario y ayuda a Meche con los adornos. Rosario baila felizmente el vals principal con su padre.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Sergio tiene un terrible accidente y Bella teme por su vida Antonieta se pone muy mal, tiene un parto prematuro y su bebé no sobrevive.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Bella está decidida a encontrar a Sergio, aunque tenga que pedir la ayuda de Rodolfo San Genis, él acepta ayudarla a cambio de que se case con él.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: Penélope intenta matar a María, pero ella se defiende y termina siendo castigada por iniciar el pleito. María siente culpa por la muerte de Calixta al pensar que su hijo fue quien la mató e imagina que ve al fantasma de Calixta.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: María le dice a Gonzalo que está dispuesta a casarse con él después de salir de la cárcel. Armenteros decide dejar de ser el abogado de Soraya al descubrir todos sus engaños.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: Santiago le propone a María Mercedes casarse con él. Santiago habla con el licenciado Portales y le exige que case a María Mercedes con él aunque ella no lo acepte.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: María Mercedes le cumple a Santiago su última voluntad y se casa con él. Malvina recibe la noticia de que Santiago ha cambiado su testamento y teme haber perdido todo.

programme.title: La que no podía amar
programme.desc: María se llena de esperanza al ver cómo Cynthia comienza a interesarse en ella. Vanesa humilla a María al enterarse de que Cynthia es su hija.

programme.title: La que no podía amar
programme.desc: Gustavo sospecha que Bruno es el verdadero culpable de todas las cosas malas que han sucedido en el pueblo. Gustavo idea un plan para demostrarle a todos que Bruno no es el hombre que dice ser.

programme.title: Lo que la vida me robó
programme.desc: Víctor le pide ayuda a Alejandro para escapar con Nadia a otro país y poder estar juntos para siempre. Adolfo se niega a asesinar a Anselmo y le pide a Ezequiel hacerlo.

programme.title: Lo que la vida me robó
programme.desc: Nadia le confiesa a Víctor que está embarazada y cuando Pedro se entere querrá quedarse con el bebé. Montserrat va a buscar a Angélica a su casa para despedirse de ella.

programme.title: Lo que la vida me robó
programme.desc: Víctor le cuenta a Macario que será papá y se irá del pueblo con Nadia, pero le pide guardar el secreto. Angélica fallece en los brazos de José Luis.

programme.title: Lo que la vida me robó
programme.desc: Pedro insinúa que Alejandro no es hijo de Benjamín y pone en duda la palabra de Rosario. Montserrat se da cuenta de que Dimitrio está muy triste y él le cuenta que Josefina le pidió el divorcio y se irá del pueblo.

programme.title: Lo que la vida me robó
programme.desc: Graciela le ofrece ayuda a José Luis para recuperar a Montserrat a un precio muy alto, pero él no acepta su negocio. El capitán Robledo arresta a José Luis y es enviado a prisión.

programme.title: El manantial
programme.desc: El padre Salvador sabe que su sobrina fue secuestrada y viaja de regreso a San Andrés. ¿Quién dará con su paradero?

programme.title: El manantial
programme.desc: Justo muere y en San Andrés hay cierta tranquilidad. Alfonsina y Héctor reciben el testamento. El padre Salvador casa a Alfonsina y Alejandro.

programme.title: La que no podía amar
programme.desc: Rogelio le promete a Ana Paula que la ayudará a que Miguel no vaya a prisión. Ernesto le deja en claro a Gustavo que Ana Paula sigue enamorada de Rogelio. Gustavo sospecha que Bruno es uno de los involucrados de su secuestro.

programme.title: La que no podía amar
programme.desc: Vanesa y Bruno enfurecen al saber que la hacienda de Rogelio no se pude comprar. Ana Paula decide continuar con el juicio en contra de Vanesa para poder recuperar su herencia. Gustavo enfrenta a Rogelio y le dice que luchará por el amor de Ana Paula.

programme.title: La que no podía amar
programme.desc: María decide alejarse de Cynthia para evitar que la continúe humillando. Macaria y Ulises logran divorciarse. Ana Paula comienza a trabajar como enfermera en uno de los mejores hospitales del pueblo.

programme.title: La que no podía amar
programme.desc: Cynthia recibe la mala noticia de que será trasladada al penal. Cynthia seduce a un policía para lograr convencerlo de que la ayude a escapar. Ana Paula decide divorciarse de Rogelio.

programme.title: La que no podía amar
programme.desc: Presos del penal llevan a cabo los planes de Bruno para deshacerse de Miguel. Miguel descubre que Rosaura lo traicionó a él y a Ana Paula.

programme.title: Hotel todo Incluido: Hotel en remodelación
programme.desc: Cirpriano les dice a los empleados que tienen que desalojar el hotel porque lo van a renovar. Los empleados dicen que desempeñan muy bien su trabajo y que es injusto que no les paguen.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos
programme.desc: Albertano y Vítor conocen a dos mujeres que les hacen creer que están interesadas en ellos, pero solo quieren su dinero.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos
programme.desc: Vítor acepta tener una cita con una mujer casada y usa a Albertano para distraer a su amiga, pero el esposo de la mujer aparece y tienen que fingir tener una relación.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos
programme.desc: Dada su experiencia como chofer de microbuses, ahora que es rico, Vítor decide convertirse en piloto de carreras y, con Albertano, crea la escudería "Los Guapos".

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos
programme.desc: Natasha se encuentra con una presuntuosa y molesta excompañera de la escuela. Vítor y Albertano deciden hacer pasar a Natasha por una exitosa millonaria que vive rodeada de lujos y servidumbre para poner a la presumida en su lugar.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos
programme.desc: Vítor y Albertano deciden que lo suyo es ser jefes, y por ello compran una fábrica para producir accesorios para automóvil.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: En su búsqueda por trabajo, Albertano es contratado por María de todos los Ángeles pero sucede una tragedia que Rosa Aurora tendrá que arreglar.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: Los niños del barrio apedrean a Ofertín con Albertano dentro. El chino tiene una fiesta y doña Lucha invita a Nayeli. María va a un centro nocturno con sus amigas pero sus acompañantes las dejan con la cuenta.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: Rosa cambia el viejo refrigerador de Doña Lucha por uno de nueva tecnología y además parlante, lo cual vuelve loca a Lucha. Maria sorprende a Alberto acaramelado con Gloria y de celos inicia una competencia con Betsabé por un chico guapo.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: Rosa recomienda a su hermano Albertano para presentar el nuevo shampoo Placentex Antiesponge. Maria le plancha el uniforme de Elvis y provoca los celos de Doña Lucha, que se lo arruga.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: El Chino necesita visitar el Museo de Antropología e Historia para un trabajo de la escuela. María se ofrece a acompañarlo y compromete a Albertano a ir con ellos. Sin embargo, los jóvenes pasan una romántica tarde hasta que se acuerdan lo prometido.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.sub-title: Entre el bote y el agujero
programme.desc: Plácido está en la cárcel y Pierre trata de abonar la fianza, pero queda libre Jacinta. Los López tratan de tapar el agujero porque, si no lo hacen, se irán a la calle.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.sub-title: El regreso de la Licha viviente
programme.desc: La tía Licha regresa de entre los muertos, donde en realidad nunca estuvo. Plácido la corre de la casa, pero la familia se apiada de ella.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: Los López reordenan la casa cuando descubren que la tía Licha es su nueva vecina porque heredó el departamento contiguo. Plácido encuentra un nuevo empleo, en el que debe lidiar con una millenial déspota.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Sabrina le confiesa a Miguel que no está embarazada Diego golpea a Javier, y León lo ve Mia le dice a Miguel que lo perdona, pero su relación no puede seguir Diego le asegura a Roberta que no robó su diario Mia y Roberta quieren dejar RBD.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Diego anuncia que RBD se va de gira, pero las chicas deciden no ir por Mia. Reverte logra que los alumnos ganen el primer lugar del intercolegial, y Roberta se molesta porque dice que se hace el héroe.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Pascual le dice a Reverte que tendrá que acompañar a los alumnos a su viaje. Franco se molesta con Alma por autorizar la salida de Mia del colegio para la gira de RBD. Javier le sugiere a León ir a la playa con sus compañeros del Elite.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Alma le pregunta a Franco si está seguro de terminar con ella Diego asegura que su papá está en Nueva York y no sabrá que están de gira Miguel no sabe cómo decirle a Mia que Sabrina es la fotógrafa oficial de RBD Sol abandona a Celina en la selva.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Mia se entera que Sabrina estará en el concierto de RBD en Monterrey y se entristece Max llega a Puerto Vallarta y, al ver a Celina, le dice que la quiere. Roberta le dice a Mia que no permita que Sabrina le quite las ganas de cantar.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: José y Celina se asustan al ver a Javier y al enterarse que León está en Puerto Vallarta el concierto de RBD fue un éxito, y Mia le agradece a Roberta sus consejos Javier le dice a León que Diego esta con una chica para distraerlo.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Los chicos de RBD sufren porque en el avión en el que viajan tienen unas terribles turbulencias provocadas por una tormenta.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre: Grandes tierras
programme.desc: Fernando trata de convencer a Gabriela de que no permita a Sofía entrar a la administración de la hacienda. Sofía se despide de Juan para siempre.

programme.title: Muchacha italiana viene a casarse
programme.desc: Fiorella le confiesa a Pedro que está enamorada de él, pero cuando están a punto de besarse Dante los interrumpe. Vittorio le dice a Fiorella que la boda será en un mes y ella se desmaya.

programme.title: Muchacha italiana viene a casarse
programme.desc: Eloísa le pregunta a Gael qué pasó entre Pedro y Osvaldo, y él le dice que Osvaldo le disparó a propósito. Pedro regaña a Fiorella por pasar tiempo con Vittorio en el jardín en horas laborales.

programme.title: Muchacha italiana viene a casarse
programme.desc: Julieta le asegura a Eloísa que Fiorella le quiere hacer daño por haber discutido con ella. Pedro y Benito ayudan a Fiorella a esconderse de Dante.

programme.title: Muchacha italiana viene a casarse
programme.desc: Diana le llama a la policía para informarle dónde está escondida Fiorella. Pedro encuentra la evidencia para demostrar que Fiorella es inocente. Unos hombres tratan de abusar de Gianna y Gael logra rescatarla.

programme.title: Muchacha italiana viene a casarse
programme.desc: Pedro consigue un video que demuestra que Fiorella es inocente. Por su parte, Vittorio le dice a Fiorella que no quiere que siga trabajando con Eloísa y que la llevará a vivir con él.

programme.title: Muchacha italiana viene a casarse
programme.desc: Roxana le dice a su familia que Gael está enamorado de Gianna, y Eloísa le pide que se enamore de una mujer que no sea una sirvienta. Pedro le pide a Fiorella que luchen juntos por su amor.

programme.title: Muchacha italiana viene a casarse
programme.desc: Pedro le promete a Gael que lo ayudará a superar su adicción. Increíblemente, Julieta recupera la vista y, después de alegrarse mucho, trata muy mal a Fiorella. Por otro lado, el médico le confirma a Sonia que está embarazada.

programme.title: El increíble profesor Zovek
programme.desc: El profesor Sovek se enfrenta a un doctor que puede controlar las mentes humanas y quiere apoderarse del planeta.

programme.title: El capitán Mantarraya
programme.desc: El capitán de un pequeño bote narra sus interesantes aventuras en el mar a un grupo de niños de su aldea.

programme.title: Gregorio y Su Ángel
programme.desc: En México, un anciano (Broderick Crawford) alcohólico hace amistad con una niña pequeña que es como un ángel.

programme.title: Gavilán o paloma
programme.desc: José José muestra la realidad de la vida de una estrella y cómo la fama, el dinero, y los placeres pueden destruirlo.

programme.title: La juventud se impone
programme.desc: Dos amigos estudian en la universidad y cantan en un café, ambos se empeñan en casar a sus respectivos padres.

programme.title: Las señoritas Vivanco
programme.desc: Dos hermanas solteronas creen que cometer un robo deja de ser considerado como pecado, después de ir a la confesión.

programme.title: ¡Pura vida!
programme.desc: Un hombre con mala suerte va a la capital con sus parientes, y se involucra en enredos con los patrones ricos de éstos.

programme.title: Calabacitas tiernas
programme.desc: Accidentalmente, Tin Tan se relaciona con un pícaro empresario arruinado que lo hace pasar por sí mismo para evitar dar la cara ante sus acreedores. En su nueva personalidad, Tin Tan monta un espectáculo musical con hermosas chicas.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Al peligro con tiento y al remedio con tiempo
programme.desc: Lucía es una adolescente que vive con su mamá, pero ella es tan estricta que prefiere vivir con su papá. Sin embargo, no imagina que él aún está en el tiempo de la fiesta y las mujeres.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Juventud sin salud, más amarga que la senectud
programme.desc: Una joven siente que su mamá no la quiere y solo se preocupa por la salud de su hermana gemela. Cuando un chico se fija en su hermana, la joven comienza a molestarla provocando que sufra un ataque, como consecuencia, la joven cambiará totalmente.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Yerros de amor, dignos son de perdón
programme.desc: Yolanda es novia de Pedro y durante su noviazgo queda embarazada, pero no logra encontrar el momento para darle la noticia. Él y su hermano se van de fiesta y tienen un accidente automovilístico uno de ellos fallece.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Más vale pedir perdón que pedir permiso
programme.desc: Desde niño, Pepe ha pensado que su mamá había muerto. Conoce a una mujer mayor, de la cual piensa que se ha enamorado, sin saber que el destino le tiene preparado una fuerte noticia que cambiará su vida.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Doncellez y preñez no pueden ser a la vez
programme.desc: Galia es una chica cuyo máximo sueño es bailar. Junto con sus amigas Cintia y Julls asisten a una especie de clínica de baile con uno de los mejores profesores de danza. No se imaginan la mala experiencia que tendrán que vivir.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: En casa del pobre, el que no trabaja no come
programme.desc: Una joven descubre lo mucho que su mamá sufre y hace para mantener un hogar cuando sufre un infarto y ella debe encargarse de los quehaceres de la casa.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Una mujer se encuentra en condiciones de extrema pobreza y decide abandonar a su hija en casa de su madre. Debido a su enfermedad, la abuela recurre a la tía de la niña para que la ayude a cuidarla, pero las cosas no salen como ellas esperan.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Más vale pájaro en mano que cien volando
programme.desc: En su afán por progresar rápido, Gaby estará muy cerca de caer en las malvadas garras de un estafador.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: La primera parte de la semifinal comienza.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: Segunda parte de la semifinal.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: Los pequeños grandes talentos se hicieron presentes en el escenario para conformar los seis escuadrones que competirán cada semana para alcanzar su sueño.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: La competencia arranca y los seis talentosos escuadrones comienzan la lucha por alcanzar sus sueños. Los capitales se enfrentan en una divertida prueba de imitación.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Una mujer de buen corazón es asesinada por su esposo, un hombre manipulador y frío quien dejó abandonada a su propia hija en los brazos de su madre fallecida.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: El tiempo parece moverse en cámara lenta para familiares, amigos y conocidos de personas que han sido víctimas de diferentes crímenes que, desgraciadamente, muchas veces no logran ser resueltos.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Algunos fueron perseguidos y separados de sus familias, otros llevados a campos de concentración y exterminados, hoy, algunos de los sobrevivientes narran el horror del holocausto judío.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Desesperados por encontrar una cura para la terrible enfermedad de su hija, una pareja aceptó ser parte de un experimento y arriesgarse a las consecuencias.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Juan Morales, cansado de estar confinado en una silla de ruedas, decidió desafiar sus límites y se convirtió en el distribuidor de drogas de su escuela. Envuelto en la violencia callejera, Juan logró salir adelante para volverse un psicólogo.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Entre lágrimas, un niño le confiesa a su madre adoptiva que quiere volver con su familia biológica. Estrellas latinas del Cirque du Soleil hablan sobre el cambio drástico en sus vidas tras la pandemia, pues se vieron obligadas a dejar los shows.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Tras múltiples denuncias, una red de oscuros secretos y abusos a menores es descubierta. Los líderes de una iglesia se ven envueltos en terribles crímenes que tendrán que pagar en prisión.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora

programme.title: Crónicas: Historias que hacen historia

programme.desc: Exuberant entertainers, and soon to be empty-nesters, Heidi and Mike want a new kind of nest for the family to come home to. It's got to be big and beautiful because it's also going to be a place for the couples many friends to party!

programme.title: What's For Sale? With A View
programme.desc: Views of powerful red rock mountains in Zion Canyon, Utah is something that Eva and Chris know they can't live without. Finally that day has come to decide just which property and view could suit their family best.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: This is a story about proximity. Many newly built homes such as semi-detached, town homes and condo units feature designs that share common walls. In the case of our homeowners, Sylvie and Guy, who had just moved into a brand new semi-detached home, they were in for a shock when they realized that they could clearly hear their next door neighbor through the walls! The sound issue was so disruptive that the homeowners were certain moving away was their only option, until Mike and the team found the solution.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: Dig into a so-called total kitchen reno that turns out to be only skin deep.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: Chris and Ihor had recently moved back to Canada after living in Texas for the last 20 years. After looking at 6 homes, they decided on one that was in a good neighborhood and hired a Home Inspector to insure that the home that was in good condition. They received a 25-page report from the home inspector, which concluded that there were only minor items that required addressing- The report also stated that the inspector will only report on surface conditions- for all major home systems such as plumbing and electrical, they defer to hiring "a qualified contractor to conduct the inspection". On moving day, some of the deficiencies became obvious as soon as they tried using the shower and fixtures in the basement. The pungent smell of sewage wafted through the home. It was the first in a series of creepy crawly, smelly and dangerous discoveries. For Chris and Ihor, and for the thousands of Canadians who have been caught in the same trap, it will take the frankness of Mike Holmes to uncover the myth that is "the Home inspection", and help this family get what they thought they had already paid for.

programme.title: Holmes On Homes
programme.desc: Living in a century home, Kjirsten and John had their bathroom remodeled with a custom slate tile shower, featuring built-in bench seating. Soon afterwards, they notice a strange substance leaching out of the tile grout and that the shower doesn't drain properly. When the bathroom ceiling starts to peel away, they realize something is wrong below the surface. Mike confirms their beautiful looking, new slate shower, is only skin deep.

programme.title: Holmes On Homes
programme.desc: Nancie and Woody moved into a 25-year-old townhouse that required some updating- particularly the floors and the "tiny" kitchen space. As renovations got underway, Woody was unexpectedly hospitalized. The contractors were left virtually unsupervised while Nancie tried to manage her job, visit Woody and take care of their daughter. All of the contractors were very sympathetic to her stating, "don't worry about the renovations- you are in good hands." What they left behind was simply one big mistake- one that Mike and the team will correct, with the help of a Country singing guest star.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes

programme.title: Now Serving Mrs. Pizarro
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy discuss what they will do with their severance pay once the company is sold, but have to put discussion on hold while they repo repo a hovercraft golf cart from a snooty golfer. Next, Sonia and Ronnie's easy day at the salon gets disastrous when the should-be debtor serves Sonia with a lawsuit. And finally, Froy and Carlos head out to a worksite to repo the bulldozer that Carlos should have been training for.

programme.title: Taken for a Ride
programme.desc: A professional stunt driver slips through Froy and Sonia's grasp, sending them on a violent high speed chase. Matt offends a pretty RO who seeks womanly revenge, and Froy and Carlos go undercover at a lowrider show. And when Sonia announces a dangerous plan to save the company from the lawsuit, the team must decide whether they're willing to risk it all.

programme.title: The Final Finale
programme.desc: On this special one hour series finale of Operation Repo, the team are scrambling to get ready for the huge Yacht repo to secure the sale of the company and the distribution of their severance packages, while still going after every day repos. In this episode, Sonia and Froy find a payment procrastinating pervert in the park, Matt and Ronnie put the brakes on a rich racecar driver, Matt and Carlos get stuck in the middle of sign maker's gluing process, and Ronnie and Carlos try to reason with an irresponsible retro racist. And finally, on their most dangerous repo ...

programme.title: It Ain't No Joke!
programme.desc: In this kick-off to the final season, the cast takes viewers back through the most outrageous, comical, and memorable repos of the series. And, get a sneak peek of the final season of Operation Repo.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: After we meet the team members of Operation Repo, Matt, Lou, and Froy get interrupted by a bike riding gangster while trying to hook up a car. And later, Matt, Sonia, and Froy deal with an ecstatic and energetic young debtor who will not let go of her car.

programme.title: Don't You Dare Lift-off
programme.desc: First, Froy, Matt, and Lou turn tail and bail when bats and guns are swung towards them. Later, things get heated for Matt and Sonia just before they head out with Esteban and Lou to ambush a helicopter pilot.

programme.title: Collectibles
programme.desc: First, Lou, Lyndah, and Matt head to a cul-de-sac to gain possession of a speedboat, and a truck, and a trailer. Later, a rare collectible motorcycle is up for repo, and Matt, Lou, and Froy are ready to collect it. And finally, Froy, Sonia, and Lou nab a forklift from a threat-dealing debtor.

programme.title: Adult Film Star
programme.desc: First, Lou, Froy, and Matt press charges after a violent debtor attacks the crew. Later, Lou, Sonia, and Froy head out to the boondocks to repo a BMW in the middle of an adult film shoot. And finally, Sonia and Lyndah ride out in Sonia's car to meet up with the debtor's sister-in-law who helps the team find the debtor's car.

programme.title: Pizza, Hook-ups, and a Suspicious Suitcase
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy interrupt a young couple's romantic entanglement when they try to hook up to the car a young couple are trying to hook-up in. Next, tempers and Pizza fly when Sonia, Matt, and Lyndah repo a pizza parlor's customer's car. And finally, Sonia and Lou grab a truck from a car graveyard, but soon have to avoid the employee's scratch attacks and deal with the nervous debtor with a suspicious suitcase full of cash.

programme.title: Exterminate or Retaliate
programme.desc: First, Lou calls in an exterminator and has Froy, Sonia, and Lyndah go to an address to ambush them for their truck. Next, Matt, Froy, and Lou bring the debtors to the ground when they head out to repo a back hoe tractor. And finally, Froy, Lou, and Lyndah bully their way through a bunch of ignorant punk kids to grab some four wheelers.

programme.title: Unwanted Seizures
programme.desc: First, Lou sends Sonia and Matt to repo a Toyota Corolla from a recently divorced debtor determined to keep the car she won in the divorce. Later, Lou cuts a repo short to send Froy and Matt to tail a car until the debtor realizes he's being followed. And Finally, when a debtor goes into a seizure during his seizure of his vehicle, Lou, Sonia, and Lyndah tend to the man while they wait for help to arrive.

programme.title: Pepper Spray and Guns
programme.desc: First, Froy and Sonia douse a couple with a dose of pepper spray when the debtor gets too pushy with Sonia. Next, Matt and Froy battle biker girls when going after a motorcycle. And Finally, Matt and Froy confront a couple of delinquents in attempt to repo the couple's car, but they are soon sent running when the couple pushes back with guns.

programme.title: Who Wants Ice Cream?
programme.desc: First, Sonia, Matt, Froy, and Lou roll up and roll on a gang of brothers to gain possession of an Infinity. Next, Matt and Froy stand in the way of a drugged debtor keeping his car. And finally, it's time for some ice cream for Lou, Froy, and Sonia when they head out to repo an ice cream truck.

programme.title: The Cop, the Pizza Delivery Man, and the Repo Men
programme.desc: First, Lou sends Sonia and Froy out to repo from a pizza delivery man way behind on his payments. Then, Matt and Froy deal with an unhelpful citizen when they have to repossess from a cop. And finally, Sonia, Lyndah, and Matt deal with another repossessor when trying to repo a repo truck, until Lou can get on scene and offer the debtor a deal.

programme.sub-title: Martha Stewart, Upcycling with TikTok's Sarah, Drew's News D.C. Edition, Hometown Spirit Portland

Plus, Drew and Ross Mathews are taking their desk on the road and serving you the news sunny-side up from Philadelphia. Drew is celebrating hometown pride all week long with viewers sharing tours of what makes their town so special and unique including today's hometown spirit tour of Denver.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show

Plus, Drew has a big surprise for Ina you won't want to miss!

Plus, actress Jurnee Smollett on her new film, "Lou."

programme.desc: Five teams of campers try to figure out what's wrong with an angry rhinoceros, a two-toed sloth, a tortoise named Speedy, a newborn giraffe, and a young bald eagle.

programme.title: The Wildlife Docs
programme.desc: A zebra develops a limp. Also, a look at various groups of tigers, noting the differences between hand-raised tigers and tigers raised by their moms.

programme.title: The Wildlife Docs
programme.desc: When a male lemur named Gozzie doesn't show the female lemurs their proper respect, he ends up having to visit The Wildlife Docs. Then, aardvarks don't look like any other animal, in fact they look like they're a combination of animals. And just wait until you meet the new baby aardvark named Peanut.

programme.title: The Wildlife Docs
programme.desc: A lesser bush baby is resisting its everyday mealtime and turacos get a routine examination.

programme.title: The Wildlife Docs
programme.desc: Penguins are coming to Busch Gardens Tampa. We'll be there as one new chick emerges from his shell, and be part of training sessions as the young penguins learn to swim and stand still for X-rays. Plus, two unique canine species, a fennec fox and a New Guinea singing dog, are suffering from stubborn skin conditions so they need to visit a dermatologist.

programme.title: The Wildlife Docs
programme.desc: Hold your nose! It's time to meet two striped skunks, and witness a skunk exercising to lose weight. Plus, Busch Gardens Tampa is crawling with lizards from all over the world! The team gives us an inside look at what it means to care for these unique species.

programme.title: The Wildlife Docs
programme.desc: Olivia the greater bush baby has given birth to her second son, and the two of them are due in for checkups. Plus, a bale of turtles, terrapins and tortoises all need the attention of The Wildlife Docs, for a variety of issues, from a damaged shell to a fractured leg.

programme.title: A Dog For Life

programme.desc: With Keta Rush injured, can Stephy Slays find a new partner to help end Exile's reign of brutality? The Lioness returns to the ring for the first time since suffering humiliation and betrayal at the hands of Lana Star and Team Blondage. Former WOW World Champion, Tessa Blanchard is hungrier than ever for her shot at The Beast, but she must first claim victory in tonight's Number One Contender match against a treacherous competitor.

programme.title: WOW Women Of Wrestling

And the IQ Superior, Samantha Smart employs a new “hands on” strategy with The Disciplinarian.

It is a triple threat match that you won't want to miss!

programme.title: Man Cave: Mech Marvels
programme.desc: Man Cave S1E2: Mech Marvels Where the beauty of modern engineering takes center stage and captures the essence of speed, innovation, and timeless design. Elements of jazz, funk, and alternative hip-hop create a mid to down tempo flow perfect for those looking to relax in style.

programme.title: Black Artists Now III
programme.desc: Black Artists Now S1E3 — A transcendent journey celebrating the vibrancy & diversity of black culture. From evocative photographs to vivid canvases, this collection pays homage to the global tapestry of black identity, uniting voices and visions that resonate with the soul.

programme.title: Colors of Pride
programme.desc: Colors of Pride S1E1 ⚊ Artwork collected in celebration of LGBTQ pride.

programme.title: Featured Artists
programme.desc: Featured Artist Series S1E2: Mark Scheff + Mischelle Moy — A fusion of the diverse artistic visions of our featured artists. Marc Scheff captures emotions through expressive portraits that speak to the soul while Mischelle Moy embraces the beauty of nature through vibrant colors and mesmerizing landscapes.

programme.title: Featured Artists
programme.desc: Featured Artist Series S1E4: Cole Rise + Kate Winsy — A fusion of the diverse artistic visions of our featured artists. Cole Rise mesmerizes with otherworldly landscapes bathed in soft hues while Kate Winsy invites viewers into a serene visual journey where nature's beauty takes center stage.

programme.title: Happy Hour: Oktoberfest
programme.desc: Happy Hour S1E3: Oktoberfest — Immerse yourself in the lively spirit of Oktoberfest and the camaraderie of happy hour. With a blend of vivid colors and intricate details, this art collection transports you to bustling beer gardens, traditional attire, and clinking glasses.

programme.title: Happy Hour IV
programme.desc: Happy Hour S1E4 — This art collection masterfully captures life's vibrancy, alive with the exuberant energy of happy hour. Each piece dances with color and movement complementing the refreshing and illuminative mid-tempo tunes of strings, keys, synth leads, and bass.

programme.title: Weeknight Chill: Painters' Showcase
programme.desc: Painters' Showcase S1E1 — Extraordinary paintings hand-selected by the Loupe team.

programme.title: Zen Evenings: Black & White
programme.desc: Black & White S1E1 — An extraordinary art collection that embodies timeless beauty and sophistication. Each piece, crafted with a monochromatic palette, reveals the exquisite interplay of light and shadow. From captivating landscapes to evocative portraits, these black and white images evoke a sense of refined elegance, transporting viewers to a realm of tasteful minimalism.
